installCommand: python3 -m venv .vercel-venv && .vercel-venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .vercel-venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements-docs.txt
buildCommand: .vercel-venv/bin/python -m zensical build -f zensical.toml --clean && .vercel-venv/bin/python -m zensical build -f zensical.tr.toml --clean
